---
title: "IFCD044 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd044, backlog]
---


<style>
tr:nth-child(0) {
  background-color: #b2b2b2!important;
  color: #f4f4f4!important;
}
</style>


![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

## ``Sprint#2: Approaches Multi-Agent App I`` (July 2026)

::: {.column-page-right}
| Sprint | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| #2 | 04 |  06/07/2026 | - Planning Sprint#2: </br> (1) Plan Approaches Multi-Agent </br> (2) Plan readings </br> (3) Plan syllabus   </br></br>  - Week 1: Meetings, Impediments and Iterations  </br></br> - SCRUM Guide| - [Week#01](/scrum/scrum-week1.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [SCRUM Guide](/scrum/scrum-what-guide.qmd){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Scrum Summary](https://albertprofe.dev/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/SCRUM-summary.html){.external target='_blank'}  |
|  | 05 | 07/07/2026 |  - Week 2: User stories, Tasks and Habits </br></br> - SCRUM Guide  </br></br> - CifoLab 13:00  | - [Week#02](/scrum/scrum-week2.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [SCRUM Guide](/scrum/scrum-what-guide.qmd){.external target='_blank'}</br>   |
|  | 06 | 08/07/2026 | - Week 3: Delivering Value & Communication  </br></br> - SCRUM Manifesto: 12 principles |  - [Week#03](/scrum/scrum-week3.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [SCRUM Manifesto: 12 principles](/scrum/scrum-what-agile-manifesto.qmd){.external target='_blank'}</br>   |
|  | 07 | 09/07/2026 |  - Week 4: ScrumMaster, how it works  </br></br>  - SCRUM Manifesto: 12 principles|  - [Week#04](/scrum/scrum-week4.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [SCRUM Manifesto: 12 principles](/scrum/scrum-what-agile-manifesto.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  |
|  | 08 | 10/07/2026 | Week 5: Mindset, the key to everything  </br></br>  |  - [Week#05](/scrum/scrum-week5.qmd){.external target='_blank'}   |
: Sprint #2  Backlog course July 2026 table {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,60,34]"}
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Legend"}
- `-` > topic planned and **done**
- `- ` <s>done</s> > topic not done in class (**pending**)
- `++` > not-planned new topic
:::
